family_history: There is no family history of prostate or breast cancer.
previous_notes: The patient is not on 5-ARI medication. No relevant comorbidities recorded, with a Charlson Comorbidity Index (CCI) of 3.
pathology_report: The patient underwent one biopsy session. At biopsy, Gleason 4+4 (ISUP grade group 4, AI model-predicted ISUP 5) was identified in the left base; cribriform pattern was present. The reported histological growth pattern was: Adenocarcinoma.
radiology_report: Prostate volume: 37.29 cc. PSA density: 2.306 ng/mL/cc. PI-RADS: 5. AI model-predicted probability of clinically significant prostate cancer (0–1): 0.9527162.
surgical_pathology_report: The robot-assisted radical prostatectomy specimen showed Gleason 4+3 (ISUP grade group 3), pathological stage pT4b. Extraprostatic extension was present; surgical margins were positive; the seminal vesicles were invaded; lymphovascular invasion was absent; lymph node metastasis was present.
